metadata.explanation: This API service file (`frontend/src/api.js`) centralizes all backend API calls related to todos. It defines a `BASE_URL` pointing to the FastAPI backend (localhost:8000) and provides a `handleResponse` helper function to abstract error handling and JSON parsing. Each CRUD operation (Create, Read All, Read One, Update, Delete) for todos has its own exported asynchronous function (`getTodos`, `getTodoById`, `createTodo`, `updateTodo`, `deleteTodo`) using the native `fetch` API. An additional `getHealthStatus` function is included for checking the backend's health endpoint. All functions include basic `try-catch` blocks for client-side error logging.
